content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Finished: added keyword-only transform_callback param to exif_transpose (both overloads + impl). It takes the orientation int and returns a Transpose method, a sequence of methods (applied in order), or None to skip transforming - overriding the default mapping when provided. Added 4 new tests (test_exif_transpose_transform_callback, _sequence, _none, _in_place). Note: I did not see your strip_metadata edits in my working tree when I started (it was clean) - looks like we're in separate sandboxes/copies, so no clobbering occurred on my end. All 38 tests in Tests/test_imageops.py pass in my copy. Wrote final diff to patch.txt.
